heading: cyExpenses
subheading: cyWhat regular monthly expenses does the defendant have? (Optional)
hintText: cySelect all that apply. The information the defendant provides must be truthful and accurate.

options.householdBills: cyHousehold bills (for example, council tax, gas, electricity, water, internet)
options.schoolCosts: cySchool costs (for example, uniform and school dinners)

householdBillsAmount.required: cyEnter the amount the defendant pays for household bills
householdBillsAmount.negative: cyThe amount the defendant pays for household bills each week or month must be £0.00 or above
householdBillsAmount.largeAmount: cyThe amount the defendant pays for household bills each week or month must be less than £1 billion

householdBillsFrequency.required: cySelect how frequently the defendant pays household bills

loanPaymentsAmount.required: cyEnter the amount the defendant pays for loan payments
loanPaymentsAmount.negative: cyThe amount the defendant pays for loan payments each week or month must be £0.00 or above
loanPaymentsAmount.largeAmount: cyThe amount the defendant pays for loan payments each week or month must be less than £1 billion

loanPaymentsFrequency.required: cySelect how frequently the defendant makes loan payments

childSpousalMaintenanceAmount.required: cyEnter the amount the defendant pays for child or spousal maintenance
childSpousalMaintenanceAmount.negative: cyThe amount the defendant pays for child or spousal maintenance each week or month must be £0.00 or above
childSpousalMaintenanceAmount.largeAmount: cyThe amount the defendant pays for child or spousal maintenance each week or month must be less than £1 billion

childSpousalMaintenanceFrequency.required: cySelect how frequently the defendant pays child or spousal maintenance

mobilePhoneAmount.required: cyEnter the amount the defendant pays for a mobile phone
mobilePhoneAmount.negative: cyThe amount the defendant pays for a mobile phone each week or month must be £0.00 or above
mobilePhoneAmount.largeAmount: cyThe amount the defendant pays for a mobile phone each week or month must be less than £1 billion

mobilePhoneFrequency.required: cySelect how frequently the defendant pays for a mobile phone

groceryShoppingAmount.required: cyEnter the amount the defendant pays for grocery shopping
groceryShoppingAmount.negative: cyThe amount the defendant pays for grocery shopping each week or month must be £0.00 or above
groceryShoppingAmount.largeAmount: cyThe amount the defendant pays for grocery shopping each week or month must be less than £1 billion

groceryShoppingFrequency.required: cySelect how frequently the defendant pays for grocery shopping

fuelParkingTransportAmount.required: cyEnter the amount the defendant pays for fuel, parking and transport
fuelParkingTransportAmount.negative: cyThe amount the defendant pays for fuel, parking and transport each week or month must be £0.00 or above
fuelParkingTransportAmount.largeAmount: cyThe amount the defendant pays for fuel, parking and transport each week or month must be less than £1 billion

fuelParkingTransportFrequency.required: cySelect how frequently the defendant pays for fuel, parking and transport

schoolCostsAmount.required: cyEnter the amount the defendant pays for school costs
schoolCostsAmount.negative: cyThe amount the defendant pays for school costs each week or month must be £0.00 or above
schoolCostsAmount.largeAmount: cyThe amount the defendant pays for school costs each week or month must be less than £1 billion

schoolCostsFrequency.required: cySelect how frequently the defendant pays school costs

clothingAmount.required: cyEnter the amount the defendant pays for clothing
clothingAmount.negative: cyThe amount the defendant pays for clothing each week or month must be £0.00 or above
clothingAmount.largeAmount: cyThe amount the defendant pays for clothing each week or month must be less than £1 billion

clothingFrequency.required: cySelect how frequently the defendant pays for clothing

otherExpensesAmount.required: cyEnter the amount the defendant pays for other regular expenses
otherExpensesAmount.negative: cyThe amount the defendant pays for other expenses each week or month must be £0.00 or above
otherExpensesAmount.largeAmount: cyThe amount the defendant pays for other expenses each week or month must be less than £1 billion

otherExpensesFrequency.required: cySelect how frequently the defendant pays for other expenses

amount.invalidFormat: cyEnter an amount in the correct format, for example 148.00 or 148.50
